revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-375

The property of a feedback control system or element such that its output is asymptotic, i.e., the output will ultimately attain a steady state within the linear range and without continuing external stimuli.

Reference: ANSI (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
